title: EventBridge Schedule Finder
description: An interactive CLI command that prompts user inputs to query and find existing EventBridge Scheduler schedules. Supports filtering by schedule name, name prefix, state, group name, and AWS region

introBox.headline: How it works
text: This interactive CLI script prompts the user for optional inputs like Schedule Name, Prefix, State, Group and Region. It dynamically builds the appropriate AWS CLI command using 'get-schedule' for exact lookups or 'list-schedules' for filtered searches. If no filters are provided, it lists all schedules in the specified region.

snippets.title: Copy and paste the snippet into your terminal and enter the optional inputs
